title: Update 01-intro.md
body: Adding command to explicitly become root user. I was trying to run commands with "sudo" in front and thus had issues following guide (new user) and this would have helped!

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

bot, add author to whitelist
```
@KyleRConway Thanks for the PR, but you have to sign it.
git commit -a --ammend -s
git push --force
```
Should fix it.

Thanks, @rhatdan & @TomSweeneyRedHat 
I made the edit through github's web-GUI while working through the guide, so I'll work on signing the PR when at my machine later tonight. Appreciate the help!
@rhatdan -- Hopefully this was successful. Let me know if not. Appreciate the help.

Looks good.  Some problems with the test infrastructure.
